description: AI Supply Chain Security Scanner - Detect malicious hooks, MCP servers, prompt injection, and supply chain attacks in Claude Code, Cursor, and other AI coding assistants. v2.2 adds timeout protection, progress tracking, logging, and 6 new Docker security rules.
shortDescription: AI Security Scanner v2.2 - Timeout protection + Docker rules
author: JavaMaGong
changelog: v2.2.1: Fix crash on large directories - add file timeout (5s), total timeout (10min), file size limit (10MB), progress tracking, logging, YAML config support, 6 new Docker rules (DOCKER-001~006), CLAUDE-006 MCP injection detection, test suite (4 tests)
